title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving Claude Code productivity: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video presents these as practical techniques for accelerating development output with Claude.
